Title: Prohibits public utilities from passing along the cost of site investigation and remediation efforts on to rate payers
Summary: Prohibits public utilities from passing along the cost of site investigation and remediation efforts on to rate payers; requires each public utility with more than seventy-five thousand customers to submit to the public service commission an annual report containing a description of any expenses that may not be included or incorporated in the public utility's operating expenses.
LawCode: Add Art 12 §§240 & 241, amd §5, Pub Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to prohibiting public utilities from passing along the cost of site investigation and remediation efforts on to rate payers
